overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a slow ascent through abandoned stadium bleachers in a dystopian cyberpunk city at dusk. The camera reveals a massive yellow tower with red neon signage before culminating in a panoramic rooftop view of a highway and sprawling cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned stadium bleachers with blue painted numbers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the concrete stadium steps through rows of empty seating

entered.detail: rows of concrete stadium seating with large blue painted numbers
blue tarpaulin sheets draped over equipment or structures on the left side
tall construction crane visible against the hazy sky above distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily upward through rows of empty stadium seating marked with blue numbers. A blue tarp covers equipment on the left, while a construction crane is visible against the hazy sky in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium upper deck approaching rooftop edge

events.description: exiting the covered stadium section, revealing the massive yellow tower with red neon lights
ambient light increases as the camera emerges from the stadium structure into open dusk sky

agents.ego_description: continuing to climb the stadium steps toward the upper edge where the tower becomes visible

entered.detail: massive yellow skyscraper with large white 04 signage and red neon trim

segments.scene_description: As the camera climbs higher, a towering yellow building emblazoned with '04' and red neon trim dominates the view ahead. The stadium roof structure becomes visible as the blue tarp falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop overlook of cyberpunk city highway

events.description: view opens up to reveal the highway and sprawling cityscape below the rooftop edge
camera slows to take in the panoramic city view while moving along the edge

agents.ego_description: standing at the rooftop edge looking out over the city highway and distant skyline

entered.detail: multi-lane highway with moving vehicle lights winding through the city below
distant cyberpunk cityscape with scattered building lights against the darkening sky
silhouetted mountains visible on the horizon beyond the city

segments.scene_description: From the rooftop edge, the camera reveals a sweeping view of a multi-lane highway with sparse traffic winding through the dystopian city. The yellow tower now stands prominently to the left while distant mountains and city lights fill the horizon under the darkening dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous upward ascent from the claustrophobic confines of abandoned stadium seating to a sweeping panoramic vista of a dystopian cityscape at dusk. It begins by gliding steadily up rows of empty bleachers marked with blue numbers, passing a blue tarp and a distant construction crane silhouetted against a hazy sky. As the camera climbs higher, the stadium roof structure emerges and the view opens to reveal a towering yellow building emblazoned with red neon signage and the number 04. The scene then shifts as the camera reaches the rooftop edge, expanding into a wide perspective of a multi-lane highway with sparse traffic winding through the urban sprawl. Finally, the yellow tower recedes to the left as the horizon opens up to reveal distant mountains and flickering city lights under a darkening sky.
